message:
fix(storage): disable semantic latency budget in hybrid search test

The storage_handle_hybrid_search_uses_semantic_cache_and_invalidation
test was sensitive to wall-clock timing because the default semantic
budget config enforces a latency ceiling. On loaded machines this
caused sporadic test failures when the semantic path exceeded the
budget and was bypassed.

Set max_semantic_latency_ms to u64::MAX in the test fixture to ensure
the semantic search path is always exercised regardless of host load.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
